name: privacy-pools-cli-json-contract
description: Stable machine-readable output contract for privacy-pools CLI.

error.nextActions: NextAction[]? (structured recovery follow-ups for agents and automation)
error.retry: { strategy, maxAttempts?, initialDelayMs?, maxDelayMs?, note? }? (retry policy for retry-only recoverable errors)

errorBase.nextActions: NextAction[]? (structured recovery follow-ups for agents and automation)
errorBase.retry: { strategy, maxAttempts?, initialDelayMs?, maxDelayMs?, note? }? (mirrors error.retry when present)

nextAction.cliCommand: string? (fully executable CLI invocation with kebab-case flags; omitted when runnable = false)
nextAction.options: Record<string, string|number|boolean|null>? (named options in source-object form; prefer cliCommand for direct execution)
nextAction.parameters: [{ name: string, type: string, required: boolean }]? (present when runnable = false and extra user input is required)
nextAction.runnable: boolean? (false means the action is a template and needs additional user input before execution)
nextAction.ordering: private/resume paths first; required public recovery before optional public recovery; optional public recovery after private paths; deposit templates last

flowWarning.suggestedRoundAmount: string? (present for PRIVACY_NONROUND_AMOUNT when a round alternative can be suggested)
flowWarning.escape: "--allow-non-round-amounts"? (present only on commands that honor this escape hatch)

successFields.mnemonicImported: boolean (true when the recovery phrase was loaded rather than generated)
successFields.backupFilePath: string? (present when the generated recovery phrase was written to a backup file)
successFields.recoveryPhraseRedacted: boolean? (true when a new recovery phrase was generated but not printed)
successFields.recoveryPhrase: string? (present only when newly generated and --show-recovery-phrase is provided)
successFields.restoreDiscovery: { status: "deposits_found"|"no_deposits"|"legacy_website_action_required"|"degraded", chainsChecked: string[], foundAccountChains?: string[] }? (present for existing-account load flows)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (present when a canonical CLI follow-up is available)

stagedJsonl.preflight: { existingConfig: boolean, existingRecoveryPhrase: boolean, existingSignerKey: boolean, signerKeyValid: boolean, importedRecoveryPhrase: boolean, importedSignerKey: boolean }
stagedJsonl.signer: { signerKeySource: string, signerKeySet: boolean, required: boolean }
stagedJsonl.complete: { setupMode, readiness, defaultChain, signerKeySet, mnemonicImported, backupFilePath?, restoreDiscovery?, warning? }

successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (suggests upgrade command when status is ready)
successFields.externalGuidance: { kind: "manual_install", message: string, command?: string|null }? (present when status = "manual" and the remediation is intentionally external to the CLI)

successFields.privacyDelayConfigured: boolean (true when the workflow explicitly saved a delay policy; false for legacy snapshots normalized to off)
successFields.privacyDelayRangeSeconds: [number, number] (inclusive randomized range in seconds; [0, 0] for off)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (present when a canonical saved-workflow follow-up is available)
successFields.reconciliationRequired: boolean (true when onchain confirmation succeeded but local workflow state still needs sync)

dryRunFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (flow start template for the real submission)

successFields.signerBalance: decimal-string-wei|undefined (present when rpc check succeeds and signer balance lookup succeeds)
successFields.readyForDeposit: boolean (configuration capability flag: configExists && recoveryPhraseSet && signerKeyValid)
successFields.readyForWithdraw: boolean (configuration capability flag: configExists && recoveryPhraseSet && signerKeyValid)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (present when a canonical CLI follow-up is available)
NextAction[]? (suggests deposit as a template action)

detailVariant.myFunds: { balance: decimal-string-wei, usdValue: string|null, poolAccounts: number, pendingCount: number, poaRequiredCount: number, declinedCount: number, accounts: [{ id, status, aspStatus, value }] }|null
detailVariant.myFundsWarning: string? (present when wallet state could not be loaded fully)
detailVariant.recentActivity: [{ type: string, amount: string|null, timeLabel: string, status: string|null }]|null

successFields.approvalTxHash: 0x-prefixed-hash|null (present when deposit auto-ran approve+deposit; null for native ETH or sufficient existing allowance)
successFields.label: decimal-string|null
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (submitted results point to tx-status and flow status; confirmed results point to flow status plus accounts review polling)
successFields.reconciliationRequired: boolean? (true when onchain confirmation succeeded but local wallet state still needs sync)
successFields.localStateSynced: boolean? (false when local reconciliation is still required)
successFields.warnings: { code: string, category: string, message: string }[]|undefined

successFields.anonymitySet: { eligible: number, total: number, percentage: number }? (when available from the ASP)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (submitted results point to tx-status; confirmed results point to accounts or sync follow-up)
successFields.reconciliationRequired: boolean? (true when onchain confirmation succeeded but local wallet state still needs sync)
successFields.localStateSynced: boolean? (false when local reconciliation is still required)
successFields.warnings: { code: string, category: string, message: string }[]|undefined
successFields.extraGasFundAmount: decimal-string-wei|undefined (relayed ERC20 withdrawals with extra gas enabled)
successFields.nativeTokenPrice: number|undefined (USD quote for the gas token when available)

dryRun.anonymitySet: { eligible: number, total: number, percentage: number }? (when available from the ASP)

unsignedRelayed.quoteSummary: { quotedAt: iso8601-string, quoteExpiresAt: iso8601-string, baseFeeBPS: string, quoteFeeBPS: string, feeAmount: decimal-string-wei, netAmount: decimal-string-wei, relayerHost: string, extraGas: boolean }

quote.anonymitySet: { eligible: number, total: number, percentage: number }|undefined
quote.warnings: { code: string, category: string, message: string }[]|undefined
quote.nextActions: NextAction[]? (structured follow-up commands for agents; check runnable for template actions)

successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (submitted results point to tx-status; confirmed results point to accounts or sync follow-up)
successFields.reconciliationRequired: boolean? (true when onchain confirmation succeeded but local wallet state still needs sync)
successFields.localStateSynced: boolean? (false when local reconciliation is still required)
successFields.warnings: { code: string, category: string, message: string }[]|undefined
AccountWarning[]? ({ chain, category, message } for per-chain partial failures)
successFields.lastSyncTime: iso8601-string|null|undefined (oldest cached sync across queried chains)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (poll-oriented only; emitted when pending approvals exist)

summaryVariant.warnings: AccountWarning[]? ({ chain, category, message } for per-chain partial failures)
summaryVariant.lastSyncTime: iso8601-string|null|undefined (oldest cached sync across queried chains)
summaryVariant.nextActions: NextAction[]? (poll-oriented only; emitted when pending approvals exist)

pendingOnlyVariant.lastSyncTime: iso8601-string|null|undefined (oldest cached sync across queried chains)

balanceFields.balance: decimal-string-wei (total across Pool Accounts with remaining balance)
balanceFields.poolAccounts: number (account count included in the balance total)

successFields.warnings: MigrationWarning[]? ({ chain, category, message } for per-chain partial failures)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (empty unless status = "review_incomplete", where a retry action is emitted)
NextAction[]? (history follow-ups such as accounts, pools, or deposit templates)

successFields.chain: string ("all-mainnets" for cross-chain global activity, selected chain name otherwise)
successFields.chainFiltered: boolean? (true when chain filtering happens client-side)
successFields.note: string? (explains pagination limitations when chainFiltered is true)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (pagination when more pages exist; otherwise a read-only follow-up such as pools or accounts)

successFields.exitCodes: CapabilityExitCode[] ({ code, name, category, errorCode?, description })
successFields.envVars: CapabilityEnvVar[] ({ name, aliases, category, description, defaultValue?, sensitive? })
successFields.documentation: object? (bundled reference, JSON contract, envelope schema index, and error-code reference paths)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (suggests describe for a concrete command path)

successFields.expectedNextActionWhen: string[]|undefined (when values this command may emit in nextActions)
successFields.agentFlagNames: string[]|undefined (structured flags accepted in agent invocation examples)
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (suggests running the described command path or related schema exploration)

indexVariant.envelopeRoots: string[] (top-level schema roots accepted by describe envelope.<path> and single-token schema lookups)

schemaVariant.path: string (contract path passed to describe envelope.<path>)
schemaVariant.schema: unknown (JSON contract fragment at that path)

successFields.eventCounts: { deposits?: number, withdrawals?: number, ragequits?: number, total?: number }|undefined
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (suggests accounts to review synced Pool Accounts)

guide.note: Outputs formatted help text to stderr in interactive mode. In JSON mode, returns the guide text plus structured topics.

successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (suggests the first concrete follow-up command for the selected topic)

config.note: Bare config uses the shared help envelope. Config subcommands return the structured payloads below.

subcommandVariants.config list: { defaultChain, recoveryPhraseSet, signerKeySet, rpcOverrides: Record<number, string>, configDir, nextActions?: NextAction[] }
subcommandVariants.config get: { key, value?, set, redacted?, nextActions?: NextAction[] }
subcommandVariants.config set: { key, updated, changed, removed, summary, nextActions?: NextAction[] }

completion.note: Completion has three JSON variants: raw script output, completion-query candidates, and managed install results.

successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (install guidance after script/query modes; guide follow-up after managed install)

successFields.transactions: BroadcastTransaction[] ({ index, description, txHash: 0x-prefixed-hash|null, blockNumber: decimal-string|null, explorerUrl: string|null, status: "submitted"|"confirmed"|"validated" })
successFields.warnings: { code: string, category: string, message: string }[]|undefined
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (submitted bundles point to tx-status; confirmed bundles point to accounts review for the underlying source operation)

successFields.pollingRecommendation: { initialSeconds: number, maxSeconds: number, backoffFactor: number }|undefined (present while status = "submitted")
successFields.lastError: { step: string, errorCode: string, errorMessage: string, retryable: boolean }|null
successFields.transactions: SubmissionTransaction[] ({ index, description, txHash, explorerUrl, blockNumber, status })
successFields.nextActions: NextAction[]? (uses after_submit while the bundle is still pending, then routes to flow status, accounts, or sync once settled)

unsignedCalldataABIs.withdrawDirect: function withdraw((address processooor, bytes data) _withdrawal, (uint256[2] pA, uint256[2][2] pB, uint256[2] pC, uint256[8] pubSignals) _proof)
unsignedCalldataABIs.withdrawRelayed: function relay((address processooor, bytes data) _withdrawal, (uint256[2] pA, uint256[2][2] pB, uint256[2] pC, uint256[8] pubSignals) _proof, uint256 _scope)
unsignedCalldataABIs.ragequit: function ragequit((uint256[2] pA, uint256[2][2] pB, uint256[2] pC, uint256[4] pubSignals) _proof)
